card_description: Baruch Spinoza is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Baruch Spinoza. Context: "Dick formally merges seven distinct philosophical and religious traditions into a "Synthetic Cosmology" aimed at defining the 2-source struggle between Zebra (Yang) and the Black Iron Prison (Yin)."
